en: And he said to them, "Truly, I say to you, there are some standing here who will not taste death until they see the kingdom of God after it has come with power."
zh: 耶穌又對他們說：“我實在告訴你們，站在這裡的，有人在沒有嘗過死味以前，必定看見 神的國帶著能力降臨。”

en: And after six days Jesus took with him Peter and James and John, and led them up a high mountain by themselves. And he was transfigured before them,
zh: 過了六天，耶穌帶著彼得、雅各、約翰，領他們悄悄地上了高山，在他們面前改變了形象。

en: and his clothes became radiant, intensely white, as no one on earth could bleach them.
zh: 他的衣服閃耀發光，極其潔白，地上漂布的沒有能漂得這樣白的。

en: And there appeared to them Elijah with Moses, and they were talking with Jesus.
zh: 又有以利亞和摩西向他們顯現，並且跟耶穌談話。

en: And Peter said to Jesus, "Rabbi, it is good that we are here. Let us make three tents, one for you and one for Moses and one for Elijah."
zh: 彼得對耶穌說：“拉比，我們在這裡真好！我們可以搭三個帳棚，一個為你，一個為摩西，一個為以利亞。”

en: For he did not know what to say, for they were terrified.
zh: 彼得不知道該說甚麼才好，因為他們都非常害怕。

en: And a cloud overshadowed them, and a voice came out of the cloud, "This is my beloved Son; listen to him."
zh: 有一片雲彩來，籠罩他們，又有聲音從雲中出來：“這是我的愛子，你們要聽他。”

en: And suddenly, looking around, they no longer saw anyone with them but Jesus only.
zh: 門徒立刻周圍觀看，再也看不見別的人，只見耶穌單獨和他們在一起。

en: And as they were coming down the mountain, he charged them to tell no one what they had seen, until the Son of Man had risen from the dead.
zh: 他們下山的時候，耶穌吩咐他們，人子從死人中復活之前，不要把所看見的告訴人。

en: So they kept the matter to themselves, questioning what this rising from the dead might mean.
zh: 門徒把這句話記在心裡，又彼此討論從死人中復活是甚麼意思。

en: And they asked him, "Why do the scribes say that first Elijah must come?"
zh: 他們就問耶穌：“經學家為甚麼說以利亞必須先來呢？”

en: And he said to them, "Elijah does come first to restore all things. And how is it written of the Son of Man that he should suffer many things and be treated with contempt?
zh: 耶穌說：“以利亞固然要先來復興一切，但聖經為甚麼又記載人子要受許多苦，被人藐視呢？

en: But I tell you that Elijah has come, and they did to him whatever they pleased, as it is written of him."
zh: 其實我告訴你們，以利亞已經來了，他們卻任意待他，正如經上指著他所說的。”

en: And when they came to the disciples, they saw a great crowd around them, and scribes arguing with them.
zh: 他們回到門徒那裡，看見一大群人圍著他們，又有經學家和他們辯論。

en: And immediately all the crowd, when they saw him, were greatly amazed and ran up to him and greeted him.
zh: 眾人看見了耶穌，都很驚奇，就跑上前去向他問安。

en: And he asked them, "What are you arguing about with them?"
zh: 他問他們：“你們和他們辯論甚麼？”

en: And someone from the crowd answered him, "Teacher, I brought my son to you, for he has a spirit that makes him mute.
zh: 群眾當中有一個回答他：“老師，我把我的兒子帶到你這裡來，他被啞巴鬼附著。

en: And whenever it seizes him, it throws him down, and he foams and grinds his teeth and becomes rigid. So I asked your disciples to cast it out, and they were not able."
zh: 無論在哪裡，鬼抓住他，把他摔倒，他就口吐白沫，咬牙切齒，渾身僵硬。我請你的門徒把鬼趕出去，他們卻辦不到。”

en: And he answered them, "O faithless generation, how long am I to be with you? How long am I to bear with you? Bring him to me."
zh: 耶穌回答他們：“唉！不信的世代啊！我跟你們在一起到幾時呢？我要忍受你們到幾時呢？把他帶到我這裡來吧。”

en: And they brought the boy to him. And when the spirit saw him, immediately it convulsed the boy, and he fell on the ground and rolled about, foaming at the mouth.
zh: 他們就把孩子帶到他跟前。那鬼一見耶穌，就立刻使孩子抽了一陣瘋，倒在地上，流著唾沫打滾。

en: And Jesus asked his father, "How long has this been happening to him?" And he said, "From childhood.
zh: 耶穌問他父親：“這事臨到他有多久了？”他說：“從小就是這樣。

en: And it has often cast him into fire and into water, to destroy him. But if you can do anything, have compassion on us and help us."
zh: 鬼常常把他扔在火裡水中，要毀滅他。如果你能作甚麼，求你可憐我們，幫助我們。”

en: And Jesus said to him, "If you can! All things are possible for one who believes."
zh: 耶穌對他說：“‘如果你能’ —對於信的人，甚麼都能！”

en: Immediately the father of the child cried out and said, "I believe; help my unbelief!"
zh: 孩子的父親立刻喊著說：“我信！但我的信心不夠，求你幫助我。”

en: And when Jesus saw that a crowd came running together, he rebuked the unclean spirit, saying to it, "You mute and deaf spirit, I command you, come out of him and never enter him again."
zh: 耶穌看見群眾圍攏了來，就斥責那污鬼說：“聾啞的鬼，我吩咐你從他身上出來，不要再進去。”

en: And after crying out and convulsing him terribly, it came out, and the boy was like a corpse, so that most of them said, "He is dead."
zh: 那鬼大聲喊叫，使孩子重重地抽了一陣瘋，就出來了。孩子好像死了一樣，所以許多人都說：“他死了！”

en: But Jesus took him by the hand and lifted him up, and he arose.
zh: 但耶穌拉著他的手，扶他起來，他就站起來了。

en: And when he had entered the house, his disciples asked him privately, "Why could we not cast it out?"
zh: 耶穌進了屋子，門徒私下問他說：“為甚麼我們不能把那污鬼趕出去呢？”

en: And he said to them, "This kind cannot be driven out by anything but prayer."
zh: 耶穌對他們說：“這一類的鬼，非用禱告是趕不出去的。”

en: They went on from there and passed through Galilee. And he did not want anyone to know,
zh: 他們從那裡出去，經過加利利，耶穌不想讓人知道，

en: for he was teaching his disciples, saying to them, "The Son of Man is going to be delivered into the hands of men, and they will kill him. And when he is killed, after three days he will rise."
zh: 因為他正在教導門徒。他又對他們說：“人子將要被交在人的手裡，他們要殺害他，死後三天他要復活。”

en: But they did not understand the saying, and were afraid to ask him.
zh: 門徒不明白這話，又不敢問他。

en: And they came to Capernaum. And when he was in the house he asked them, "What were you discussing on the way?"
zh: 他們來到迦百農。在屋裡的時候，耶穌問他們：“你們在路上爭論甚麼？”

en: But they kept silent, for on the way they had argued with one another about who was the greatest.
zh: 門徒一聲不響，因為他們在路上彼此爭論誰為大。

en: And he sat down and called the twelve. And he said to them, "If anyone would be first, he must be last of all and servant of all."
zh: 耶穌坐下，叫十二門徒來，對他們說：“誰想為首，就該作眾人中最末的一個，作眾人的僕人。”

en: And he took a child and put him in the midst of them, and taking him in his arms, he said to them,
zh: 於是拉過一個小孩子來，叫他站在門徒中間，又把他抱起來，對他們說：

en: "Whoever receives one such child in my name receives me, and whoever receives me, receives not me but him who sent me."
zh: “凡因我的名接待一個這樣的小孩子的，就是接待我；凡接待我的，不是接待我，而是接待那差我來的。”

en: John said to him, "Teacher, we saw someone casting out demons in your name, and we tried to stop him, because he was not following us."
zh: 約翰對耶穌說：“老師，我們看見有一個人奉你的名趕鬼，就禁止他，因為他不跟從我們。”

en: But Jesus said, "Do not stop him, for no one who does a mighty work in my name will be able soon afterward to speak evil of me.
zh: 耶穌說：“不要禁止他，因為沒有人能奉我的名行了神蹟，又立刻毀謗我。

en: For the one who is not against us is for us.
zh: 不反對我們的，就是贊成我們的。

en: For truly, I say to you, whoever gives you a cup of water to drink because you belong to Christ will by no means lose his reward.
zh: 無論誰因你們有屬基督的名分，給你們一杯水喝的，我實在告訴你們，他決不會失掉賞賜。

en: "Whoever causes one of these little ones who believe in me to sin, it would be better for him if a great millstone were hung around his neck and he were thrown into the sea.
zh: “如果有人使一個信我的小弟兄犯罪，倒不如在他的頸項上拴一塊大磨石投在海裡。

en: And if your hand causes you to sin, cut it off. It is better for you to enter life crippled than with two hands to go to hell, to the unquenchable fire.
zh: 如果你的一隻手使你犯罪，就把它砍下來。你身體殘廢進永生，總比有兩隻手下到地獄，進入那不滅的火裡好得多。
如果你的一隻腳使你犯罪，就把它砍下來。你瘸腿進永生，總比你有兩隻腳而被丟在地獄裡好得多。

en: And if your foot causes you to sin, cut it off. It is better for you to enter life lame than with two feet to be thrown into hell.
zh: 如果你的一隻眼睛使你犯罪，就把它挖出來。你只有一隻眼睛進 神的國，總比你有兩隻眼睛而被丟在地獄裡好得多，
在那裡蟲是不死的，火是不滅的。

en: And if your eye causes you to sin, tear it out. It is better for you to enter the kingdom of God with one eye than with two eyes to be thrown into hell,
zh: 每一個人必被火當鹽來醃。

en: 'where their worm does not die and the fire is not quenched.'
zh: 鹽是好的，但如果失了味，可以用甚麼使它再鹹呢？你們自己裡面應當有鹽，彼此和睦。”

en: For everyone will be salted with fire.
Salt is good, but if the salt has lost its saltiness, how will you make it salty again? Have salt in yourselves, and be at peace with one another."
